top_signals.title: Spot Oil Premiums Fall After US-Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Spot premiums for crude and some refined products in Asia, Europe and Africa have fallen back following a U.S.-Iran deal to end the Middle East conflict, though caution about how soon normal shipping can resume is providing a floor for oil markets.Prices tumbled across the board on Monday after U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Three Iranian tankers exit U.S. blockade for first time in months as shipowners eye Hormuz in 'wary disbelief'
top_signals.summary: At least three Iranian tankers carrying nearly five million barrels of crude oil have exited the U.S. Navy blockade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Inflation to reveal economic consequences of US-Iran war
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Fresh inflation data this morning is set to reveal the economic impact of the US-Iran war. We’ll get new consumer price index print at 7am from the Office for National Statistics, which a poll of City analysts by Bloomberg has forecast will come in at [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: With war likely over, Iranian rulers must face demands of angry, embittered population - Reuters
top_signals.summary: With war likely over, Iranian rulers must face demands of angry, embittered population  Reuters

top_signals.title: Pentagon restores U.S. military’s Pacific Command moniker, dropping ‘Indo’
top_signals.summary: The command's vast area of responsibility "remains exactly the same," the Pentagon said, with the move coming amid soured U.S.-India ties.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Snap unveils $2,195 AR glasses as CEO Evan Spiegel bets on post-smartphone future
top_signals.summary: Snap is launching its first AR glasses geared toward the broader public instead of developers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Patch Tuesday, May 2026 Edition
top_signals.summary: Artificial intelligence platforms may be just as susceptible to social engineering as human beings, but they are proving remarkably good at finding security vulnerabilities in human-made computer code. That reality is on full display this month with some of the more widely-used software makers -- including Apple, Google, Microsoft, Mozilla and Oracle -- fixing near record volumes of security bugs, and/or quickening the tempo of their patch releases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA warns of another cPanel plugin flaw exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has given U.S. government agencies three days to secure their servers against an actively exploited vulnerability (CVE-2026-54420) in the LiteSpeed cPanel user-end plugin. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Live markets: A bitcoin bottom signal flashed as holders absorbed 125,000 BTC in June
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: China Reclaims Solar Crown With Record-Breaking Perovskite Panel
top_signals.summary: Last year, South Korea’s Qcells set the world record for large-area silicon solar cell efficiency, a development that promised to dramatically shrink the size of solar projects and slash costs. Qcells, a subsidiary of South Korea’s giant conglomerate Hanwha Corp, set the world record after achieving 28.6% efficiency by combining a top light-absorbing layer of perovskite with a bottom silicon layer to capture a broader spectrum of sunlight. For some context, high-end commercial solar panels typically operate at 21% to 23% efficiency,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says SpaceX investors aren't buying earnings — they're buying Elon Musk
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SpaceX investors are betting on Elon Musk's vision and track record, rather than the company's current earnings power.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
top_signals.summary: Lawmakers in both houses of Congress are demanding answers from the U.S. Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) after KrebsOnSecurity reported this week that a CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and a vast trove of other agency secrets on a public GitHub account. The inquiry comes as CISA is still struggling to contain the breach and invalidate the leaked credentials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: Italian Business Lobby Calls to Speed up Roll-Out of Renewables
alerts.summary: Italy's business lobby Confindustria has called for emergency action from the government to speed up the roll-out of renewable energy in the country, which is grappling with much higher power costs than in most of Europe.The recent increase…
